approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 includes hedge accounting for recognised assets and liabilities, and specifically addresses when foreign currency risk on intragroup monetary items can qualify in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 includes hedge accounting for highly probable forecast transactions and specifically contemplates qualifying foreign currency risk on highly probable intragroup forecast transactions in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 establish net investment hedging as a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency exposures relating to foreign operations in consolidated financial statements.
